steps.title: Trace the practical application
steps.content: The underlined finding says the air around the mushrooms also became cooler. The next sentence says those temperature reductions inspired an air-cooling device, so the underlined portion provides the key finding behind the practical application.

steps.title: Dismiss weaker functions
steps.content: B treats the finding only as support for internal fungal cooling. C calls it tangential even though it drives the device example. D reverses the sequence by saying the observation motivated the earlier study. The answer is A.
